Closes the prompt-vs-parser mis-citation class that aborted three runs. REJECTED apply-layer graceful-drop (breaches DEC-40's resolve raise-on-miss hardening + diverges workshop/production); DEC-40/DEC-53 gate posture unchanged, fabrication/structural stay fatal. Enacted via FGAP-047 + TASK-057.

title: Production orchestration-trio architecture: build the trio (US-LLM-23/24/25) lean in the Django app reusing the 9 essential families, bypassing the prompt-workshop/pi-workflows layer; design per current (Mar-Jun 2026) practice
body: (user decision, 2026-06-20, by direction after a forensic state investigation + a current-practice research pass.) Settles the architecture for the production realization of DEC-29's north star, recorded in full at docs/production-orchestration-trio-architecture-2026-06-20.md (the referenceable artifact). Refines DEC-29 and clarifies DEC-41. Established facts (verified vs live source 2026-06-20): the shipped product is lean -- ~9 essential families already built (build_grounding grounding.py:385; the 14 parse_* + _check_in_catalogue specs.py:483; _freetext_audit; PromptTemplate + ai/migrations 0003-0026; AssistStreamView views.py:488; AssistSpec/AssistResult assist.py; _check_promotion_gates services.py:98; save_nested formsets.py:470; advance_plan_status services.py:210); the trio is a server-side loop over the 14 dependency-ordered assists reusing these, built in planner/plans/ai, importing ZERO prompt-workshop/pi-workflows/.workshopping code (verified: only docstrings + tests reference the workshop). The one genuinely-new piece is the draft-state accumulation seam: today the BROWSER orchestrates (collectDraftState ai-assist.js:143 -> server runs one spec -> applyFormsetPrefill ai-assist.js:200 writes back); production has no server-side prefill->draft merge (the workshop's apply.py MERGE_RULES is dev-only). The byzantine layer (pi-workflows + run_workflow.mjs, the .workshopping substrate, the dual render path, verify-render-parity, check_draft.py 1158 LOC, verify-citability.py 913 LOC, self_check.py) is deliberately OFF the path -- it produced 29 filed toolchain defects (16 pi-workflows + 13 pi-context) and is retired/frozen after the trio lands; its legitimate kernel (exercising real grounding+parsers vs real tenant data, surfacing real bugs DISC-30/31..35/DEC-55) is value already delivered, not lifted into production. Six research-grounded design decisions (Mar-Jun 2026 sources, recency-constrained, confidence-marked in the doc): (1) decompose + reason-then-format per section -- one big schema degrades accuracy and fails validation at scale (0% at 369 fields); keep the 14 calls (verified arXiv 2604.03616/2602.12247); (2) provider grammar-constrained output for SHAPE, parsers for MEANING (verified docs.claude.com); (3) catalogue-anchored generation with provenance -- the citability invariant done at generation, fabrication's root cause is missing provenance (verified mdpi 15/3/178); (4) resilience = external-validator + bounded escalating repair (Accept/fix/reformulate up to budget R) + machine-readable (not prose) error feedback -> per-section degrade-to-flag, no run aborts (arXiv 2606.05037/2605.27630 source-only; TACL-2024 stale-foundational); (5) deterministic promotion gate, never an LLM judge as gate (openreview eFwJZIN9eI / arXiv 2512.16041 source-only); (6) plain loop, NOT Temporal/DBOS durable execution unless runs grow long/costly/crash-sensitive (DBOS behavior verified ai.pydantic.dev). The 3 pending assists (US-LLM-7 zh_hans narrative twin / US-LLM-10 priority_rationale / US-LLM-15 phase grouping) are pattern-fill (parser + template migration + registration; model fields + forms already exist), no new architecture. RESOLVED (the apparent forks are decided by best practice + 3 live-source facts: Plans persist ONLY via one atomic whole-graph POST -- no partial-Plan save; the promotion gate runs at promote-time on a SAVED proposed Plan, and saving a proposed Plan is gate-free; a FlagSeverity system already exists): (1) cross-stage accumulation = a persisted flat draft_state row (DEC-33 needs the draft to survive admin review between stages, and a partial Plan cannot persist), folded per-spec via the inverse of applyFormsetPrefill -- NOT the workshop's MERGE_RULES (FGAP-018 bug source), NOT a partial Plan; (2) final persist = one atomic save_nested writing the whole proposed Plan, then the REAL _check_promotion_gates on the saved Plan drives the US-LLM-25 closure loop (no parallel gate); (3) per-spec resilience = bounded retry with machine-readable feedback then degrade-to-Flag, budget R~=2-3 is a tuning constant not an architecture choice; (4) plain loop, NOT Temporal/DBOS -- each stage is a discrete request over the DB draft row, no long-running in-process workflow to make durable. Residual plan-mode items are verifiable facts not forks: the draft-row's exact shape/location, and save-then-gate-closure idempotency. Research caveat: the deep-research run was rate-limit-degraded (10/25 claims 3-vote-verified, synthesis auto-step failed); 'source-only' claims are direct primary-source quotes not independently triple-voted, and the six decisions do not each hinge on a source-only claim.
raw: 2026-06-20 DEC-57 (direction, post forensic-investigation + current-practice research): production orchestration-trio architecture settled, full doc at docs/production-orchestration-trio-architecture-2026-06-20.md. Build the trio (US-LLM-23/24/25) as a server-side loop over the 14 assists, lean in planner/plans/ai, reusing the 9 already-built essential families (build_grounding, 14 parse_*+catalogue-gate, PromptTemplate+migrations, AssistStreamView, _check_promotion_gates, save_nested, advance_plan_status), importing ZERO prompt-workshop/pi-workflows/substrate code (verified). One new piece: the server-side draft-state accumulation seam (production has no prefill->draft merge; browser does it today via collectDraftState/applyFormsetPrefill). Byzantine layer (pi-workflows/run_workflow.mjs, .workshopping, dual-render, verify-render-parity, check_draft 1158, verify-citability 913, self_check) deliberately off-path -- 29 filed toolchain defects -- retired after the trio. Six Mar-Jun-2026-research-grounded decisions: decompose+reason-then-format; grammar-constrained shape + parsers for meaning; catalogue-anchored generation w/ provenance; resilience via external-validator+bounded-repair+structured-feedback (degrade-to-flag, no aborts); deterministic gate not LLM-judge; plain loop not durable-execution unless heavy. 3 pending assists (US-LLM-7/10/15) = pattern-fill. RESOLVED (best practice + 3 live-source facts: atomic-only Plan persist, promote-time gate on a saved Plan, existing FlagSeverity): accumulation = persisted flat draft_state row (not partial-Plan, not workshop MERGE_RULES); final = one atomic save_nested then the real gate drives the closure loop; resilience = bounded-retry+structured-feedback then degrade-to-Flag (R~=2-3 tuning); plain loop not durable-exec (DB draft row is the durability). Residual = verifiable facts (draft-row shape, closure idempotency), not forks. Refines DEC-29, clarifies DEC-41. Research run rate-limit-degraded (10/25 verified); source-only claims = primary quotes not triple-voted.

title: Refine the no-autonomous-subagent-retry discipline: autonomous retry is permitted under a deterministic gate + a bounded iteration cap + a mandatory separate adversarial audit
body: (user decision, 2026-06-20, by approval of the verify-gated dev-loop plan, ~/.claude/plans/sequential-dreaming-cocke.md.) The standing discipline 'You may not retry a subagent autonomously after failure. Surface and wait for human direction.' (CLAUDE.md Orchestrator discipline) existed to prevent LLM-JUDGED retries from masking failure -- an agent re-running and self-declaring success without an independent check. It is REFINED, not abolished. Autonomous re-dispatch of a FRESH IMPL agent IS permitted IFF: (1) the loop's continue/stop decision is a DETERMINISTIC gate -- an exit code, never an LLM read of prose; (2) the loop is bounded by a hard iteration cap (default 5), on exhaustion it STOPS and escalates the exact stuck failure to the human (mandate-008), never spinning and never silently giving up; (3) a SEPARATE adversarial-audit agent remains mandatory before 'done' (the gate proves the tests pass; the audit proves the tests are non-vacuous and the criteria genuinely met) -- 'done' = gate exit 0 AND audit findings == 0. A hard gate removes the masking risk the original rule guarded against, so autonomous looping under these three conditions is safe. SOFT / LLM-judged loops remain FORBIDDEN from autonomous retry -- the original rule holds wherever the continue/stop signal is a model judgement rather than a deterministic gate. Trivia (cosmetic/style, language-register WARNs per DEC-53, and pre-existing/unrelated/flaky failures) is NON-BLOCKING and recorded as a Flag, never blocking completion; only the semantic/behavioral core + this-slice-introduced soundness gates (so a trivially-stupid failure can never block, and the loop cannot get bogged down). Enacted by the verify-gated dev-loop harness; mirrors the production-run resilience (DEC-57 decision 4: a per-spec failure degrades to a Flag, the run completes; only the assembled draft vs _check_promotion_gates is the blocking verdict).
raw: 2026-06-20 DEC-58 (plan approval, verify-gated dev-loop): refine 'no autonomous subagent retry' -- autonomous re-dispatch of a fresh IMPL agent IS permitted IFF (1) continue/stop is a deterministic gate exit code (not an LLM read), (2) bounded by a hard iteration cap then escalate (mandate-008), (3) a separate adversarial audit stays mandatory ('done' = gate exit 0 AND audit findings 0). The rule existed to stop LLM-judged retries masking failure; a hard gate removes that risk. Soft/LLM-judged loops STILL forbidden from autonomous retry. Trivia (cosmetic/language-WARN per DEC-53/unrelated/flaky) is non-blocking + recorded; only the semantic core + this-slice soundness gates -- so trivia never blocks and the loop never hangs. Mirrors DEC-57 dec-4 production-run resilience.

title: Trio-saved Plan sources title from A1 (system-proposed) and cycle from _active_cycle (derived) — the admin still writes only current+desired (NORTH-STAR)
body: (orchestrator decision, 2026-06-21, derived from NORTH-STAR.md during the slice-8a build; surfaced by the IMPL's mandate-008 STOP on the gap.) Building the trio save (accumulated flat draft_state -> saved Plan(lifecycle=PROPOSED)) surfaced that two REQUIRED Plan fields are never produced by the 14-spec run: Plan.title (CharField max_length=200, not-null, no blank — plans/models/plan.py:94) and Plan.cycle (FK school.Cycle, on_delete=PROTECT, not-null — plans/models/plan.py:101). A1 narrative-draft (parse_narrative + NARRATIVE_FIELDS, planner/specs.py:403) emits only current_state/desired_state/rationale/student_impact_framing/provenance; no fold writes title or cycle; PlanDraftState carries neither. The IMPL correctly REFUSED to fabricate a title and STOPped. RESOLUTION, derived from the North Star ('The admin writes ONLY the current state and the desired end state. The system proposes EVERY remaining element'): neither title nor cycle is a human input. (1) CYCLE is scoping context, not a proposed element — derive it via the existing ai.services.grounding._active_cycle(school) deriver (the same active-cycle the trio's A1 grounding already uses; grounding.py:87), injected as the bare `cycle` key by the save step; if a school has no active cycle the save surfaces that precondition failure rather than fabricating. (2) TITLE is system-proposed — its home is A1 (the narrative spec; title is a narrative scalar of-a-kind with the four it already emits). A1 is extended to emit a concise `title`: add `title` to NARRATIVE_FIELDS (the parser keeps it), and edit the DB PromptTemplate(slug='plan-narrative-draft') body via an ai/00NN migration (the guarded byte-match workshop->production bridge, ai/0016 pattern) to instruct a concise plan title. The form-step fold already passes bare narrative keys through, so the trio draft_state then carries bare `title` binding to the unprefixed PlanForm.title. CONSEQUENCE for decomposition: slice 8a splits — 8a-i 'A1 emits title' (specs + migration, its own branch+gate) PRECEDES 8a-ii 'save draft_state -> proposed Plan' (derive+inject cycle, synthesize formset management forms, reuse the PlanCreateView bind->validate->_save_plan+save_nested path). A mechanical/placeholder title was rejected as a fabrication inconsistent with 'system proposes via reasoning'.
raw: 2026-06-21 DEC-59 (North-Star-derived, surfaced by the slice-8a IMPL STOP): the trio never produces Plan.title (required) or Plan.cycle (required FK). Per NORTH-STAR (admin writes ONLY current+desired; system proposes the rest): cycle = derived via _active_cycle(school) and injected by the save (scoping, not a proposed element; no-active-cycle surfaces a precondition failure, no fabrication); title = system-proposed by A1 (a 6th narrative scalar) — add `title` to NARRATIVE_FIELDS + an ai/00NN migration editing PromptTemplate('plan-narrative-draft') to instruct a concise title (workshop->production bridge). Slice 8a splits: 8a-i A1-emits-title (precedes) -> 8a-ii save (derive+inject cycle, synth management forms, reuse PlanCreateView save path). Mechanical/placeholder title rejected as fabrication.
